top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 101, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 101 miles.
Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 101 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic. Train it until it feels boring.
101 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
At Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic's mixed terrain actually does to you.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.

race_overlay.heat: June in Royal Town of Pekan, Pahang, Malaysia can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic’s 101 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Gran Fondo Pekan / Pekan Classic requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 101 miles of mixed terrain in Royal Town of Pekan, Pahang, Malaysia.
